২০২১ সালে রেকর্ড করা প্রথম ডোজ ভিটামিন এ প্রশাসনের সর্বোচ্চ মোট সংখ্যা সহ আন্দামান ও নিকোবর দ্বীপপুঞ্জের শীর্ষ পাঁচটি উপজেলার তালিকা দিন।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T3.YEAR = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT ORDER BY SUM(T2.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    g.SUB_DISTRICT,
    SUM(f.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) AS TOTAL_VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1
FROM FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED f
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON f.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN DIM_TIME t ON f.TIME_ID = t.TIME_ID
WHERE g.STATE ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND t.YEAR = 2021
GROUP BY g.SUB_DISTRICT
ORDER BY TOTAL_VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1 DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    g.SUB_DISTRICT,
    SUM(f.VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1) AS TOTAL_VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1
FROM FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED f
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON f.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN DIM_TIME t ON f.TIME_ID = t.TIME_ID
WHERE g.STATE ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND t.YEAR = 2021
GROUP BY g.SUB_DISTRICT
ORDER BY TOTAL_VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1 DESC
LIMIT 5;

JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON s.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID

AND g.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'
